source_jobs.title: Freelance Travel Spend & Market Explorer
source_jobs.description:
About the Opportunity: Whether you are backpacking 🎒through Vietnam, island-hopping in the Philippines, or living that slow-travel life in Thailand, you know the daily routine: grabbing street food, bargaining at local markets, and renting scooters. You also know the exact moment the fun stops—when you run out of cash, can't find an ATM 🏧, or get hit with massive withdrawal fees.

We are building PayMoji, an app that lets travelers ditch the bulky wallets and pay like a local using native QR codes across Southeast Asia 🌏. To make sure it works seamlessly in the real world, we need eyes and ears on the ground 👀👂. We are looking for observant, street-savvy travelers to help us map out exactly how people spend money in the cities you are already exploring 🗺️.

We are looking to work with people in Vietnam and the Philippines but will open soon to Thailand 🇹🇭and Cambodia 🇰🇭. Feel free to reach out to us in advance!

What You Will Do

 - Hit the Streets: Go about your normal day, visit cafes ☕, night markets, and local vendors and document the payment experience.

 - Test in the Wild: Use PayMoji to scan local QR codes where you eat, shop, and travel, reporting back on how smoothly (or not) the transaction goes 📲.

 - Map the Market: Help us understand the local cash-versus-digital dynamics. Which vendors accept QR? Where is cash still king? 👑 What are the biggest physical barriers to paying digitally in your current city?

 - Gather On-the-Ground Intel: Observe and document how local merchants react to foreign travelers using local digital payment methods 🤝.

Who We Are Looking For

 - The Authentic Traveler: You must have a true understanding of being a traveler or digital nomad. We need you to empathize with our users and possess a deep customer understanding, because you live this reality every day 🌅.

 - Naturally Curious: You enjoy interacting with locals 🧐, asking questions, and noticing the small details about how a city functions.

 - Self-Motivated: 🚀 You can manage a simple research brief independently and provide clear, honest feedback from the road.

Why Collaborate With Us

 - 💰Earn While Exploring: This is a project-based, freelance role. You do not need to sit at a desk; your "office" is the market, the cafe, or the hostel.

 - 🧘‍♂️No Disruption to Your Lifestyle: Complete your tasks while doing the things you were already planning to do today.

 - 🚪Open Possibilities: As PayMoji grows across Southeast Asia, delivering great on-the-ground insights can easily lead to more project opportunities or ongoing collaboration.

How to Apply 📝

 1. Send us a short bio about who you are, where you come from, what you are doing in SouthEast Asia, and why you would be interested to work with PayMoji. 💌

 2. Share one quick story about the most annoying cash or payment issue you have experienced on your current trip. 😤

 3. Check out the app: from your point of view if you had to improve / change / modify 1 thing, what would it be?

PayMoji: Google Play https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.skymavis.paymoji&hl=en I AppStore https://apps.apple.com/us/app/paymoji-your-travel-wallet/id6764265570

source_jobs.title: Web3 Security Engineer
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT SKY MAVIS

Sky Mavis is building the future of gaming. We’re the creators of Axie Infinity, the most successful Web3 game ever, and Ronin, a purpose-built blockchain that ranked as the 4th most-used chain in 2024, behind Ethereum, Bitcoin, and Solana.

We’ve processed over $4.3 billion in on-chain volume and are backed by more than $170 million from top-tier investors, including a16z, Accel, Libertus Capital, and Paradigm.

Our team moves fast, builds with intention, and believes in a world where players truly own what they earn. If you’re excited by open economies, massive scale, and shaping new digital frontiers, join us.




ABOUT THE ROLE

The Security team drives Web2 and Web3 security for all of Sky Mavis games and digital assets, including the Ronin blockchain network, Ronin wallet, and more. With experience spanning many blockchain startups as well as recognized companies (Coinbase, Circle, JP Morgan Chase, Microsoft, Amazon, etc), the security team is building strong security policies and SDLC processes internally.

The Web3 Security Engineer is responsible for the security of smart contracts developed by the engineering team. This individual will be embedded with the engineering team to drive security best practices and ensure the bulletproof safety of smart contracts deployed. The security engineer will perform threat modeling, running scanning tools, audit the code base, work closely with engineering to resolve security vulnerabilities, and ensure the secure deployment of smart contracts.

Sky Mavis is fast adopting GenAI solutions to 100x our engineers. The security engineer will have the opportunity to learn and leverage AI to enhance and automate their workstream to improve our security best practices. This role is based in Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam.




WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Security assessments: Perform internal and external assessments of products (games, wallet, etc) to ensure the highest level of security before launch, including conducting threat modeling, tabletop exercises, and code reviews. Put on your white hat and go hunt for security vulnerabilities.

 - Monitoring: Ensure smart contracts generate sufficient events to monitor. Leverage blockchain monitoring platform to continuously monitor smart contracts.

 - Incident response: Maintain and update a runbook of procedures for handling and escalating security incidents. Participate in the incident response process to address and resolve smart contract incidents.

 - Evaluate new technology: Identify and evaluate new security technologies/tooling to adopt internally to continuously improve Sky Mavis’ security best practices.

 - Drive impact: Identify security gaps and drive positive change to improve Sky Mavis’ security posture.

 - Cross-functional collaboration: Collaborate with the engineering team to identify security gaps in smart contract architecture. Works well with others and is highly responsive.




WHAT WE LOOK FOR

 - Education: Bachelor or master degree in computer science or related field.

 - Experience: 2+ years in software engineering. Audited smart contracts.

 - Programming Languages: Strong knowledge of Solidity.

 - Skills/Knowledge: Hands-on expertise with blockchain and smart contract security. Able to audit Solidity code. Familiarity with blockchain monitoring solutions.

 - Attitude: Bias for action, driven to learn, top talent.

 - Strong communicator and active listener: Clear communication (English) and capable of building trust across diverse teams.

 - Problem-Solving: Strong analytical and problem-solving skills to identify and resolve security issues.

 - Bonus: Gamer, active crypto user, does hackathons on weekends.

Nice to Have:

 - Python scripting.

 - Experience using LLMs.

source_jobs.title: Cloud Security Engineer
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT SKY MAVIS

Sky Mavis is building the future of gaming. We’re the creators of Axie Infinity, the most successful Web3 game ever, and Ronin, a purpose-built blockchain that ranked as the 4th most-used chain in 2024, behind Ethereum, Bitcoin, and Solana.

We’ve processed over $4.3 billion in on-chain volume and are backed by more than $170 million from top-tier investors, including a16z, Accel, Libertus Capital, and Paradigm.

Our team moves fast, builds with intention, and believes in a world where players truly own what they earn. If you’re excited by open economies, massive scale, and shaping new digital frontiers, join us.




ABOUT THE ROLE

The Security team drives Web2 and Web3 security for all of Sky Mavis games and digital assets, including the Ronin blockchain network, Ronin wallet, and more. With experience spanning many blockchain startups as well as recognized companies (Coinbase, Circle, JP Morgan Chase, Microsoft, Amazon, etc), the security team is building strong security policies and SDLC processes.

The Cloud Security Engineer is responsible for the security of Sky Mavis cloud infrastructure and processes that allow the engineering team to provision infrastructure to run services that power Axie Infinity and Ronin products in a simple, safe, and secure manner.

Sky Mavis is fast adopting GenAI solutions to 100x our engineers. The security engineer will have the opportunity to learn and leverage AI to enhance and automate their workstream to improve our security best practices. This role is based in Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam.




WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Security assessments: Learn, build, improve, and maintain cloud provisioning services written in Terraform. Perform internal and external assessments of Sky Mavis’ cloud infrastructure. Identify gaps in security coverage and potential vulnerabilities/risks.

 - Monitoring: Ensure logging of all resources and continuously monitor the infrastructure. Leverage GenAI to automate scanning and filtering (to reduce false positives) of security alerts.

 - Incident response: Maintain and update a runbook of procedures for handling and escalating security incidents.

 - Evaluate new technology: Identify and evaluate new security technologies/tooling to adopt internally to continuously improve Sky Mavis’ security posture.

 - Drive impact: Identify security gaps and drive positive change to improve Sky Mavis’ security posture.

 - Cross-functional collaboration: Work with engineering and growth teams to deliver on product initiatives. Works well with others and is highly responsive.




WHAT WE LOOK FOR

 - Education: Bachelor's or master's degree in computer science or related field.

 - Experience: 2+ years in software engineering. Designed, built, scaled, and maintained backend services and infrastructure.

 - Skills/Knowledge: Hands-on expertise in cloud security, infrastructure-as-code (terraform), HMS.

 - Attitude: Bias for action, driven to learn, top talent.

 - Strong communicator and active listener: Clear communication (English) and capable of building trust across diverse teams.

 - Bonus: Gamer, active crypto user, does hackathons on weekends.

Nice to Have:

 - Experience with deploying and hosting blockchain nodes.

 - Python scripting.

source_jobs.title: Business Development Specialist, Fintech
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT SKY MAVIS

Sky Mavis is building the future of gaming. We’re the creators of Axie Infinity, the most successful Web3 game ever, and Ronin, a purpose-built blockchain that ranked as the 4th most-used chain in 2024, behind Ethereum, Bitcoin, and Solana.

We’ve processed over $4.3 billion in on-chain volume and are backed by more than $170 million from top-tier investors, including a16z, Accel, Libertus Capital, and Paradigm.

Our team moves fast, builds with intention, and believes in a world where players truly own what they earn. If you’re excited by open economies, massive scale, and shaping new digital frontiers, join us.


ABOUT THE ROLE

Sky Mavis is looking for a Business Development lead to spearhead strategic adoption in the Southeast Asian neo-banking and fintech space.

The ideal candidate will take a structured approach to building relationships and securing commercial deals with a wide variety of organizations seeking to benefit from the financial evolution made possible by Blockchain technology.


WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Identity, negotiate, and close partnerships with consumer brands, fintech platforms, and retailers

 - Drive market expansion across digital loyalty, social commerce, and fintech platforms

 - Design commercial partnership frameworks that generate revenue and increase the network effects of our products

 - Leverage existing connections to speed up deal time and gain a foothold in new markets


WHAT WE LOOK FOR

 - A strong commercial mindset. You understand how to drive growth that leads to measurable ROI

 - Exceptional networking skills. You possess a deep rolodex and the ability to expand upon it

 - An exceptional sense of urgency. You increase the speed of everyone around you and know how to get deals done quickly

 - At least 2 years of Business Development experience and a proven track record of success

Nice to Have:

 - Familiarity with crypto and blockchain

 - Experience working in a fast-paced startup environment

source_jobs.title: Vietnam Corporate Paralegal/Legal Counsel
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT SKY MAVIS

Sky Mavis is building the future of gaming. We’re the creators of Axie Infinity, the most successful Web3 game ever, and Ronin, a purpose-built blockchain that ranked as the 4th most-used chain in 2024, behind Ethereum, Bitcoin, and Solana.

We’ve processed over $4.3 billion in on-chain volume and are backed by more than $170 million from top-tier investors, including a16z, Accel, Libertus Capital, and Paradigm.

Our team moves fast, builds with intention, and believes in a world where players truly own what they earn. If you’re excited by open economies, massive scale, and shaping new digital frontiers, join us.


ABOUT THE ROLE

We are seeking a Corporate Paralegal to join the legal department to assist with the build out of the legal function. This role requires an individual who has experience with supporting an in-house legal department and can take on and juggle a variety of projects in a fast-paced environment. This position will initially report to the Senior Legal Counsel.


WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Assist with carrying out core corporate functions, including: equity and cap table management, financing and due diligence tasks, outside counsel administration, and legal notice administration.

 - Support corporate governance work streams (e.g., entity registrations and licensing, issuing legal notices, board support, etc.).

 - Maintain corporate books, minutes, and resolutions to ensure good standing.

 - Prepare signature envelopes, track execution, and archive final agreements.

 - Optimise department workflows and manage legal technology implementations.

 - Learn and prepare mandatory filings to various jurisdictions.

 - KYC & Due Diligence - Conduct background checks and verify documents for partners and transactions.

 - Manage tasks in Jira, signatures in DocuSign, and equity in Carta.

 - General support of attorneys and legal department projects.


WHAT WE LOOK FOR

 - Bachelor's Degree or equivalent.

 - Minimum of 3-5 years of work experience in a top law firm, or a similar working environment.

 - Must reside in Vietnam and be able to periodically travel to the company's global offices.

Nice to Have:

 - Keen attention to detail.

 - Self-starter and enterprising attitude.

 - Excellent writing and communication skills.

 - High capacity to own and juggle multiple, complex projects and work streams.

 - High degree of comfort and proven success in a fast-paced and dynamic environment.

source_jobs.title: HR Specialist
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT SKY MAVIS

Sky Mavis, the pioneer behind the blockchain game Axie Infinity, is revolutionizing the virtual gaming world with innovative technology and infrastructure. We are committed to fostering a dynamic and inclusive work culture where individuals can bring their authentic selves to the table. As a team of entrepreneurial disruptors and gamers, we are driven by a shared passion for making a meaningful impact and embracing the challenges and critiques that come with being at the forefront of technological advancement.


ABOUT THE ROLE

As part of the People Team at Sky Mavis, you will primarily focus on recruiting top talent while supporting a variety of HR initiatives that enhance employee experience. You will collaborate closely with hiring managers and business leaders to understand their hiring needs, develop effective recruitment strategies, and contribute to HR operations and people programs as the business evolves. The ideal candidate is someone with strong recruiting expertise who is excited to expand their HR capabilities and grow as a versatile People professional.


WHAT WE LOOK FOR

 - Partner with hiring managers to understand current and future talent needs and develop proactive recruitment strategies.

 - Manage the end-to-end recruitment process, including job posting, sourcing, screening, interviewing, and closing candidates.

 - Utilize various recruitment channels and tools to attract top talent, including job boards, social media, networking events, and employee referrals, leveraging AI-powered tools where appropriate to improve efficiency and quality.

 - Build and maintain a talent pipeline for key roles to ensure a steady flow of qualified candidates.

 - Provide an exceptional candidate experience throughout the recruitment process, from initial contact to onboarding.

 - Serve as a trusted People partner, providing day-to-day HR support and guidance to employees and managers on people-related policies, processes, and best practices.

 - Partner with the People team to ensure compliance with employment laws, company policies, and internal HR processes.

 - Support and execute a wide range of People initiatives, including onboarding, employee lifecycle management, policy implementation, HR operations, reporting, and employee engagement programs.

 - Keep up to date with industry trends and best practices in Talent Acquisition, People Operations, and HR technology, bringing new ideas to improve how we work.

 - Drive continuous improvement of People processes, systems, and documentation to enhance operational efficiency, scalability, and the overall employee experience.


WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Bachelor's degree in Human Resources, Business Administration, or related field.

 - 3 years of experience in talent acquisition or recruitment, preferably in Game, Web3, etc.

 - Proven track record of successfully managing full-cycle recruitment processes for a variety of roles.

 - Strong understanding of recruitment best practices, including sourcing techniques, candidate assessment, and employment branding.

 - Excellent communication and interpersonal skills, with the ability to build relationships with candidates and internal stakeholders.

 - Highly organized with strong attention to detail and the ability to manage multiple priorities simultaneously.

 - Proficiency in using Applicant Tracking Systems (ATS) and other recruitment tools, with experience leveraging AI-powered tools to enhance recruiting, HR processes, and operational efficiency.

 - Curious about emerging HR technologies and proactive in identifying opportunities to streamline workflows and improve team efficiency through automation and AI.

 - Passionate about diversity, equity, and inclusion, with a commitment to fostering a diverse and inclusive workplace culture.

notes: Web3 gaming company with a strong engineering focus
